cases.input_summary: A recent agent tool-use paper matches the highest-weight controlled topic and includes parsed primary evidence.
cases.reviewer_question: Should this appear in the technical top ten ahead of an equally fresh unrelated vision paper?
cases.pass_criteria: The agent paper ranks higher and its deterministic relevance component explains why.

cases.input_summary: An old off-topic paper has a model opportunity hypothesis while a current RAG paper has no model brief.
cases.reviewer_question: May the model hypothesis replace the deterministic ordering?
cases.pass_criteria: The deterministic score remains authoritative and the model signal is displayed separately.

cases.input_summary: Two papers tie on deterministic score but only one has a citation-verified Scout signal.
cases.reviewer_question: Is the tie order stable and inspectable across replay?
cases.pass_criteria: Replay produces the same deterministic order and exposes the confidence-shrunk signal without replacing the score.

cases.input_summary: A deep-dive fact claims a benchmark improvement but has no evidence ID.
cases.reviewer_question: Can the report publish the claim?
cases.pass_criteria: The verification stage rejects publication or removes the unsupported factual claim during the single repair.

cases.input_summary: A commercial recommendation is explicitly labeled as a hypothesis with unknowns and no asserted factual result.
cases.reviewer_question: May it remain in the report?
cases.pass_criteria: It remains visibly hypothetical and is not presented as verified source fact.

cases.input_summary: A critical skeptic finding is unresolved and affects a major factual claim.
cases.pass_criteria: The skeptic gate blocks publication and exposes a safe retryable failure.

cases.input_summary: A factual claim cites an evidence ID belonging to another paper.
cases.pass_criteria: The verifier rejects the unavailable evidence relationship.

cases.input_summary: Every major claim cites a stored page span from the analyzed work and coverage is 100 percent.
cases.pass_criteria: All evidence IDs resolve to the work and reported coverage equals the stored relationships.

cases.input_summary: A report section references a claim ID that is absent from the report claim inventory.
cases.reviewer_question: Can final synthesis introduce this unseen claim?
cases.pass_criteria: Structured validation rejects the unknown claim reference before publication.

cases.input_summary: A proposed pilot names a buyer and value metric but the paper does not validate market demand.
cases.pass_criteria: The opportunity is labeled commercial hypothesis with confidence and unknowns, not source fact.

cases.input_summary: A production application links only to an unsupported recommendation claim.
cases.reviewer_question: May it appear as an evidence-backed engineering opportunity?
cases.pass_criteria: It is excluded from Opportunities until at least one supported claim yields stored evidence IDs.

cases.input_summary: A commercial hypothesis cites valid evidence for the technical capability but estimates buyer value without evidence.
cases.reviewer_question: Is the technical evidence sufficient to verify the buyer-value assertion?
cases.pass_criteria: Technical capability remains cited while buyer value stays explicitly uncertain and requires validation.
